title: Expected Credit Loss (IFRS 9)
description: Provision matrix by customer class and aging bucket, expected-credit-loss computation, and adjustment to the allowance for doubtful debts. Owners can edit forward-looking adjusted rates; CFOs and Accountants read and run computations.

role_gate.title: Access restricted
role_gate.description: The IFRS 9 ECL surface is available to Owner, CFO, and Senior roles. Ask your Owner or CFO if you need access.

owner_only_hint: Only Owner can adjust loss rates. Your role has read-only access to the provision matrix.

matrix.title: Provision Matrix
matrix.subtitle: Historical and forward-looking loss rates by customer class × aging bucket. Click a cell (Owner only) to adjust the rate for a specific pair.

edit.input_aria: New adjusted loss rate, percent, between 0 and 100
edit.hint: Enter a percent between 0 and 100. Leave empty and save to clear the adjustment and fall back to the historical rate.
edit.error_invalid: Adjusted rate must be between 0 and 100.
edit.error_save_failed: Could not save the adjusted rate: {{message}}
edit.cleared: Adjustment cleared. Falls back to the historical rate.

empty.title: No matrix rows yet
empty.description: Once the ECL provision matrix is seeded for this tenant, the 42 rows (6 customer classes × 7 aging buckets) will populate here.

compute.title: ECL Computation
compute.subtitle: Run the compute engine to produce a fresh per-bucket ECL breakdown and the proposed adjustment to the allowance for doubtful debts.
compute.as_of_hint: Leave empty to use today's date.
compute.persist_hint: When Fiscal Year + Quarter are provided, the result is persisted as the quarterly audit-trail entry and a DRAFT adjustment journal entry is created when the adjustment is non-zero.
compute.dry_run_note: Dry-run: no data persisted. Totals and adjustment preview only.

result.title: Latest Computation
result.empty_placeholder: Run computation to see the latest breakdown.
result.draft_je_not_needed: No adjustment needed — computed ECL matches current allowance.
result.create_adjustment_hint: Persists the computation as the quarterly review and drafts the adjustment JE (Owner review required before posting).

errors.invalid_fy: Fiscal year must be a 4-digit year.
errors.missing_pair: Both Fiscal Year and Quarter must be provided to persist, or neither (dry-run).
